changes: strengthened the canonical Pages build verification candidate generator
requires complete workflow context and a successful PAGES_BUILD_COMPLETE receipt
requires valid build manifest SHA-256, positive file count, and positive byte count
requires all deployment, public verification, release, and execution-authority boundaries to remain false
formalism publication validation remains REVIEW_REQUIRED rather than inferred from build success
Pages artifact upload remains PENDING rather than inferred from build success
build receipt writer now chains candidate generation automatically
candidate generation remains non-mutating and fail-closed
redundant parallel promotion scripts were removed
